details.blurb: A tiny snail naturally attuned to a larger Den Den Mushi, carried as a personal long-range communicator.
details.publicNotes:
Baby Den Den Mushi are tiny snails often kept in a small pouch or worn on the wrist. They can transmit voice over extraordinary distances through an unexplained psychic connection to their bonded partner snail.

When a call comes in, the baby snail's face subtly shifts to resemble the caller's expression. It cannot speak on its own — it acts solely as a living conduit for the caller's voice.
details.privateNotes: A Baby Den Den Mushi is always bonded to a specific larger snail (or another Baby Den Den Mushi), set at the time it is acquired. It cannot contact other snails directly outside of that bond. A call to the bonded snail will ring through normally; if the bonded snail is destroyed or in a jamming field, the Baby Den Den Mushi cannot connect at all.

description.value:
The Baby Den Den Mushi is psychically bonded to a single larger Den Den Mushi (established when the snail is first acquired). It can transmit and receive voice communication with its bonded partner at unlimited range, provided neither snail is in an area suppressed by a White Den Den Mushi.

A creature holding the snail can initiate a call with 1 action (the bonded snail begins ringing). Ending the call is a free action.
